$GOOGL is reportedly in talks to bring Gemini into classified Pentagon environments after already deploying Gemini agents across unclassified DoD networks.

That would mark a major expansion of Google’s defense AI footprint into secure national security workloads.

$RKLB CEO Peter Beck said Neutron is key to scaling payload capacity & lowering launch costs as Rocket Lab pushes deeper into orbital infrastructure.

It’s all part of Rocket Lab’s plan to become a vertically integrated space platform which is why Beck joked that “world domination” is part of the thesis.
$ASTS BlueBird-7 moved one step closer to launch after Blue Origin successfully completed the New Glenn-3 static fire.

$ORCL & $AMZN just announced a partnership to expand multicloud networking through direct connectivity between Oracle Interconnect & AWS Interconnect.

That gives customers a fast, private managed connection to run applications and move data more seamlessly between OCI & AWS.
Wild to see $AEHR become a 10x for me in less than a year from when I started building the position  🤯

$AEHR received a record $41M production order from its lead hyperscale customer for package-level burn-in of custom AI ASICs used in data center training and inference.

That pushed 2H fiscal bookings above $92M (well ahead of the company’s prior ~$70M outlook) with the stock already up nearly 20%.

📺 MY $AAPL POWER PLAYS SETUP EXPLAINED

Join Power Plays: t3live.com/power

$AAPL shifted from a laggard to a clean, tradable setup with defined levels and structure. 

The play was simple: buy versus $256 support, add above $262 for confirmation, then manage the position by trimming into strength. 

This is a textbook example of focusing on setups instead of predicting tops or bottoms. 

The move shows how quickly opportunity rotates and rewards traders who stay disciplined, avoid tilt, and execute with a clear plan. 

With momentum building, the setup still has room toward the $275 area into earnings.

📺 12-DAY RALLY, +70 OSCILLATOR — TIME TO DE-RISK

Get today's newsletter: t3live.com/rd

The market has delivered a strong, almost relentless move higher, with this being around day 12 from the bottom. 

This rally followed a clear technical setup—an inverse head-and-shoulders pattern that I identified almost perfectly, as the market held key moving averages.

*

I want to warn you against the “pain trade” mindset: regretting selling too early, obsessing over missed gains, or comparing current positions to what you used to have.

This will lead you to overtrading, chasing entries late, and flipping bias incorrectly (e.g., shorting a strong market).

Instead, accept that you made good trades, focus on process, not missed upside, and avoid emotional revenge trading.

*

The market is certainly overextended right now. Technically, the oscillator is around +70 (overbought), and the market has pushed to new highs too quickly.

BUT overbought does NOT mean short.

A common trap is to short because the price is “too high” and ignore that prior resistance failed, and strength confirmed.

This usually leads to getting caught on the wrong side of the move.

*

Right now, I think it is time to ease off and let the market reset. Take profits and take your foot off the gas for now.

We really want to see sideways digestion at highs, a minor pullback to support, and holding gains before the next leg higher.

*

So, there were many ways to make money in this rally. Right now, the job is not to chase, but rather to protect gains and wait for the next setup.

If $SPY can hold near these highs and move sideways, that’s constructive and suggests buyers are still in control. 

On the downside, the first important level will be the 8-day, which represents short-term momentum—losing that would signal the rally is cooling. 

Below that, the 21-day will become the key support zone. As long as the price holds above it, the trend remains firmly intact. 

A deeper pullback toward the 50-day would still be considered normal within a strong uptrend, but would mark a shift from momentum to a more corrective phase.
